entity.label: Moladah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Birth, a city in the south of Judah which fell to Simeon (Josh. 15:21-26; 19:2). It has been identified with the modern el-Milh, 10 miles east of Beersheba.

nodes.label: Moladah
nodes.description: Birth, a city in the south of Judah which fell to Simeon (Josh. 15:21-26; 19:2). It has been identified with the modern el-Milh, 10 miles east of Beersheba.

verses.text: And they had in their inheritance Beersheba, or Sheba, and Moladah,
And they dwelt at Beersheba, and Moladah, and Hazarshual,
And at Jeshua, and at Moladah, and at Bethphelet,
